title: Campyloneurum leucorhizon
taxonomy: Campyloneurum leucorhizon is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It belongs to the genus Campyloneurum, which is a group of terrestrial ferns found in tropical and subtropical regions. The Polypodiaceae family is a large and diverse group of ferns, with over 1,000 species. Members of the family Polypodiaceae are typically characterized by their simple leaves and lack of veins on the lower surface. Campyloneurum leucorhizon is native to Central and South America.
